answer_facts: Imperial Military members may join Imperial Intelligence at any rank.
Sith must be at least Apprentice before joining Imperial Intelligence.
Imperial Intelligence takes one faction slot.
New members begin as Candidate.
routing_queries: Sith must be at least an Apprentice

answer_facts: NFU characters must be part of or join the Imperial Military and achieve at least 7S before Cipher consideration after Intel Training.
Sith must be at least Apprentice to join Intelligence and need no additional marks before Cipher consideration.
Cipher itself is listed as 10I + 7S for the NFU member-rank path.
Minister of War: Colonel Ghost.
Academy Commandant: Colonel Racer.
Minister of Intelligence: Darth Beastarius.
Keeper of Intelligence: Darth Rakkos.
Praetorian Legatus: Darth Tek T'Falla.
Sith Academy Grand Overseer: Darth Kasimir Revik.
High Overseer: Darth Vorrok Tuuk.
Forcemaster: Darth Erebus Cain.
routing_queries: Know Your Empire Imperial Military Minister of War Academy Commandant
Know Your Empire Imperial Intelligence Minister Keeper

answer_facts: Apprentice/Sergeant: Starfighter through Freighter.
Lord/Captain: Starfighter through Corvette.
Lord I/Major, Lord II/Colonel, and High Lord/General: Starfighter through Frigate.
Darth/Moff/Regulator: Starfighter through Destroyer.
Councilor+: All.
Lord/Captain: 7 droid registrations and 3 functions per droid; Assassin Function is not allowed at that bracket.
Councilor and above: Any registrations and Any functions.
Operational restrictions still govern droid escorts, supervision, and event use.
Sith progression is split into Road to Apprentice, Road to Lord, and Road to Darth sections.
Road to Darth is governed by Marks of Glory after Lord status.
This source should override unrelated crystal, beast, or ability rows for progression questions.
avoid_sources: Codex to the Beasts of the Galaxy
routing_queries: Road to Darth Marks of Glory Darth Status
rules.source_title: Character Progression in The New Imperial Order

answer_facts: Sithspawn creation belongs to Sithspawn Alchemy / Ritualist-line Praetorian material, not generic Force Sphere rows.
Sith Alchemy 2 and Sith Alchemy 3 distinguish intermediate and powerful Sithspawn creation.
Powerful Sithspawn creation requires approval through the relevant authority.
routing_queries: Sithspawn Alchemy Specialization creation of Sithspawn life

answer_facts: Military faction rules, academy structure, training, promotion, uniform, visitor, and pet/droid/vehicle rules belong in TNIO-MD-01.
Questions about current Military office holders belong to Know Your Empire instead.
routing_queries: military faction eligibility academy cadre promotion requirements
personal pets droids vehicles academy grounds

answer_facts: Operation Bastion is a Domination Campaign recap in the storyline narrative.
The correct answer should read the recap section itself, not nearby bulletin chatter.
